channel.title: Blackscrew Wiki Test
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Blackscrew Wiki Test

item.title: How to Check Starting Programs
item.description: Open Task Manger Go to Startup Apps Tab Make sure to disable the unnecessary starting programs by right clicking and setting to Disable.

item.title: Welcome to Quartz
item.description: This is a blank Quartz installation. See the documentation for how to get started.
